sources.title: [User Guide] Galaxy A57 5G and Galaxy A37 5G: Bringing Latest Innovation Within Reach
sources.excerpt: Samsung Electronics unveiled Galaxy A57 5G and Galaxy A37 5G, expanding access to its latest mobile innovations. The new Galaxy A series reflects Samsung’s commitment to democratizing AI by delivering advanced experiences at a more accessible price point. Samsung Newsroom explored the devices’ capabilities across AI, camera, design and performance. title: Samsung Introduces 14-Meter Onyx Cinema LED Display at CinemaCon 2026

sources.title: Samsung Introduces 14-Meter Onyx Cinema LED Display at CinemaCon 2026
sources.excerpt: Samsung Electronics today announced a new 14-meter standard size for its Onyx (ICD model) cinema LED lineup at CinemaCon 2026, expanding the platform into larger premium auditoriums. The new model is designed for Premium Large Format (PLF) theaters and delivers the same picture quality, reliability and scalability that define the Onyx platform at a larger scale. As cinemas raise the bar on premium, differentiated experiences, larger-format auditoriums are becoming a key priority for exhibitors.
